sections.heading: New
items: Agent can set fade in and fade out for audio and video clips
Preview playback speed control: Watch your timeline in 0.5x, 2x, 4x, or 10x speed, without modifying the timeline
Text rotation: You can now rotate text clips

sections.heading: Improved
items: Agent can set fade in and fade out for audio and video clips
Better project management: In home page, you can search, select and delete multiple projects
